summary: Iteration 6 fully verified. Backend: 9/9 pytest pass — invalid project_type ('bangun_baru','kitchen_set','renovasi') and invalid city ('Jakarta','Yogyakarta','Lainnya') all correctly return 422; happy paths (bangun_renovasi/Bali, arsitek/Malang, interior/Surabaya x3) return new fields competitor_avg_low/high, savings_percent with competitor > Timur Design price and savings 8-12% across 3 consistency calls. Frontend: estimator project_type select has exactly 4 options, city select has exactly 4 (no Jakarta/Yogyakarta/Lainnya), end-to-end submission renders result with line-through comparison block, WA CTA href contains '12% lebih hemat dari rata-rata pasar'. Services font sizes desktop (title 24px, desc 15px, bullet 14px) and mobile (title 24px, desc 16px, bullet 14px) all >= required thresholds.

issues: Console warning: <span> cannot be a child of <option> — appears to come from the dev-time x-component instrumentation wrapping option contents in spans. Not a production bug, no functional impact, but worth checking if build-time injector can be tuned.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: savings_percent fallback clamp is max(0, min(20,...)); test requires 5-20. If LLM ever returns <5 the API would respond with a value outside the contracted range. Consider clamping to (5,20) or raising minimum floor.

Estimator.jsx: comparison block uses 'competitor_avg_low > total_low' guard — if LLM returns total>=competitor (edge), the entire comparison block hides silently and WA message still says 'X% lebih hemat'. Consider also showing block or hiding the WA savings line consistently.
seed_data_creation: Estimates persisted in db.estimates during 5+ live LLM calls.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 backend regression: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration6_competitor_pricing.py (~91s, 9 tests). Note: services-card testid is 'services-card' (plural) — note the s. Estimator result block 'Rata-Rata Pasar / Harga Anda Hari Ini / Anda Hemat' labels are styled with Tailwind 'uppercase' so Playwright inner_text returns them uppercased; verify presence via .line-through element existence or regex with case-insensitive match. LLM calls take 15-25s each.
rca of the issue: No bug. Submission flake on first run was a transient 502 from Cloudflare; retry succeeded.
